Day advanced to 2026-03-05.
9,672 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-04 -> 2026-03-05)

- "What region will Donald Trump say would have been taken over without US intervention, in remarks reported by 10 March 2026?" → Middle East
- "What U.S. state outside Oklahoma will report four tornado deaths from the central U.S. storms by March 8, 2026?" → Michigan

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 108 (241 resolved, 89 active)
- accuracy: 4.5% | brier skill score: -0.017 | time weighted score: -467.76
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
